title: The Chain
why_this_song: The Chain by Fleetwood Mac (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You will never love me again
I can still hear you saying
We would never break the chain (never break the chain)
And if you don't love me now (you don't love me now)
Damn your love, damn your lies

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "never" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "never" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "chain" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "chain" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Fleetwood Mac one question about "The Chain", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Fleetwood Mac sobre "The Chain", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Chain" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Chain" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "The Chain" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "The Chain" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
